summary: Tests cover all main task requirements: the three retention policies (MaxAgeDays, KeepLatestPerWorkflow, MaxTotalSizeBytes), summary generation, dry-run mode, error handling, and workflow integration. Good organization with clear Pester structure and helper functions. Act integration testing validates exact output (SUMMARY lines, exit codes, job success). However, unit tests lack rigor in edge cases: missing tests for disabled policies (value=0), single-artifact scenarios, exact boundary conditions (artifacts created at cutoff time), size validation (zero/negative values), and string datetime parsing in ConvertTo-Artifact. The test helper pre-parses all datetimes, so string-to-datetime conversion is never exercised despite the implementation supporting it. Would catch regressions in main logic paths and workflow structure but might miss subtle bugs in policy application order, boundary conditions, and input validation.
